$description: Semantic tokens — 役割で命名。consumer は原則これを参照する。値は brand 軸ごとに上書きされる。default = i-willink. Dark mode (1.2.0+ / ADR-0013): flipping roles carry a per-token "$extensions": { "willink.dark": { "$value": "<alias or literal>" } } — the value the role resolves to under data-theme="dark" (or prefers-color-scheme: dark without a data-theme="light" opt-out). Tokens WITHOUT the willink.dark extension are mode-invariant by design (ring / brand / brand-fg / brand-glow / accent-cyan / accent-pink); primitives never flip.

fg-strong.$description: Text emphasis ladder (1.5.0+ / ADR-0016) — strongest emphasis below fg. Headings / strong runs. Contrast on bg ≥ 7 (AAA) both modes.

fg-emphasis.$description: Text emphasis ladder (1.5.0+ / ADR-0016) — labels / links / emphasized body. Contrast on bg ≥ 7 (AAA) both modes.

fg-secondary.$description: Text emphasis ladder (1.5.0+ / ADR-0016) — secondary body text, one step stronger than muted. Contrast on bg ≥ 4.5 both modes.

fg-subtle.$description: Text emphasis ladder (1.5.0+ / ADR-0016) — captions / meta / placeholders, weakest readable tier below muted. Sub-4.5 on bg in light by design (documented baseline like muted on white) — not for body text.

fg-faint.$description: Text emphasis ladder (1.5.0+ / ADR-0016) — faintest tier: disabled text / separators / decorative dividers. Non-text contrast tier (documented baseline) — never use for content text.

surface-subtle.$description: 最弱の raised surface — outline Button hover が消費 (1.2.0+)

surface-muted.$description: muted surface — TabsList 背景 / Avatar fallback / ghost Button hover / menu item focus が消費 (1.2.0+)

track.$description: control track — Switch off-track / Slider track / Progress track / Skeleton base が消費 (1.2.0+)

surface-inverted.$description: 反転 surface — Tooltip 背景が消費。light では dark-on-light の反転面、dark では light-on-dark (1.2.0+)

surface-inverted-fg.$description: surface-inverted 上のテキスト — Tooltip テキストが消費 (1.2.0+)

brand-hover.$description: brand の hover state (Button default hover) — preset では 0.9.0 から CSS 変数として出荷済み、JSON は 1.2.0 で追随

brand-active.$description: brand の active / pressed state — preset では 0.9.0 から CSS 変数として出荷済み、JSON は 1.2.0 で追随

brand-soft.$description: soft brand 面 (Badge soft variant / gradient-subtle 中間 stop) — preset では 0.9.0 から CSS 変数として出荷済み、JSON は 1.2.0 で追随

brand-soft-fg.$description: brand-soft 上のテキスト — preset では 0.9.0 から CSS 変数として出荷済み、JSON は 1.2.0 で追随

motion.$description: Role-based motion durations (0.12.0+). Components reference these by role (modal-enter, accordion, …) so a single :root override propagates to a specific interaction class without disturbing others. Sheet / accordion / toast use a single duration for both directions because the keyframe families are visually symmetric; modal/popover/tooltip split into enter/exit to allow distinct exit feel.

sheet.$description: Sheet slide — same duration for open/close (symmetric across 4 sides)

toast.$description: Toast slide-in. NOTE: currently declarative only — Sonner controls its own transitions via toastOptions.duration; reserved for a future wiring.

easing.$description: Role-based easing curves (0.12.0+). `emphasized` is intentionally only paired with `enter` (Material Motion convention — emphasized decelerate is an entry-only curve; exits use the standard curve to feel reliable).

emphasized-enter.$description: Branded / important enter (e.g. hero CTA reveal)
